overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a circular gothic classroom interior from a video game, featuring stone walls, tall arched windows with heavy drapery, and divination props arranged around a central ornate rug. The scene depicts a magical learning environment with soft morning light filtering through the windows and characters standing near the perimeter.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular divination classroom with gothic stone architecture

character in light-colored robes standing by the purple curtained window

entered.detail: rough-hewn grey stone walls with gothic architectural details forming the circular perimeter
tall gothic arched window with heavy purple drapery allowing soft light to enter
tall gothic arched window with dark blue curtains on the right side of the room
large ornate circular rug with intricate patterns covering the central floor area
circular arrangement of cushions and low seats surrounding the central rug for students
wooden table holding various divination props including teacups and crystal balls
glowing crystal ball on a stand sitting on the wooden table
tall wooden bookshelf filled with books and artifacts against the right wall
vertical board with writing and notices mounted on the left wall
dark stone archway leading to another area at the back of the classroom

segments.scene_description: A static view of a circular gothic classroom interior with stone walls and tall arched windows draped in purple and blue fabric. The room features a large central oriental rug surrounded by cushion seating for divination practice, with wooden tables holding crystal balls and teacups. Two characters in wizard robes stand near the left side by a chalkboard and window, while bookshelves line the right wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, cinematic perspective of a circular gothic classroom that emphasizes a serene atmosphere of magical study. It begins with a wide view of the stone interior, where tall arched windows are framed by heavy purple and blue drapery. The gaze settles on a large central oriental rug surrounded by cushion seating, while wooden tables nearby hold crystal balls and teacups for divination. The scene then encompasses the perimeter of the room, showing two characters in wizard robes standing by a chalkboard and window on the left, balanced by towering bookshelves lining the right wall.
